teaser.title: The European CitiVerse Data Ecosystem
teaser.text: SENSE connects cities through immersive VR/AR and metaverse-like technology, creating a **federated, citizen-centric digital ecosystem** where smart city data and services can be shared, accessed and monetized in a sovereign and trusted environment.

paragraphs.title: Building Smart, Connected Citizens
paragraphs.body: SENSE is part of the **CitiVerse** initiative — a shared European vision for digital urban transformation. By combining digital twin technology with immersive experiences, SENSE enables cities to create participatory, data-driven environments that empower citizens and foster innovation across urban domains.

paragraphs.title: Sovereign Data Exchange with Compute-to-Data
paragraphs.body: Built on the **Pontus-X ecosystem**, the SENSE Portal leverages decentralized infrastructure and **Compute-to-Data (CtD)** technology to enable secure data sharing. Data consumers can run compute jobs on private datasets while the data stays on-premise with the provider — ensuring compliance and data sovereignty.
